title: Wandering Wizardry
description: Sculk based magic and new exploration opportunities
body: # Wandering Wizardry Wandering Wizardry is an exploration focused magic mod, providing 3 unique biomes to explore, a structure to find, and more. It also provides quality-of-life features, including, but not limited to - Soul Mirror - Using it will transport you to your spawn point. - It can also be bound to lodestones, like a compass. Binding it to a lodestone will act as a waypoint you can teleport to at any time. A mirror can only be bound to one lodestone - Void Bag - Acts as a portable ender chest, with a separate inventory - Will also automatically transfer items to it if there's the same item in it already - Echo Lure - Allows you to pick up items from further away - Altar Charms - Items that alter the behavior of the altar, allowing you to automatically craft, brew, anvil, and smith - Copper Lens - Focuses the beam of a beacon, increasing the potency, but reducing the area of effect
